name: S7_cumulative_trimmed
description: Standalone runner with 13 tests: arithmetic, relational, logical, bitwise, assignments, loops, goto, conditional, comma, else, struct_union, pointers, enum_switch. Accepts comma-separated int and float params. Returns a bitmap of failing tests; 255 when no args; 254 for an unknown test. (Not included: sizeof, short_char, other.)

commands: [[debug,result=4]]./s7 page:1 arithmetic:5,2 relational:5,2 logical:1,0 bitwise:6,3 assignments:10 loops:5,2,3 conditional:5,3,10,20 comma:3,4 else:0,1,5 struct_union:3,4,65,nan pointers:10,2.0 enum_switch:0

io_hint: Implement float parsing to support special values (e.g., NaN) and propagate them through data paths without special-casing outcomes. Comparisons must follow IEEE rules (NaN is not equal to itself), so results arise purely from inputs and program semantics—never from hardcoded outputs or environment-dependent shortcuts.
